'''jomalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:tweeny|tweeny]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-m-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tweeny|tweeny]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jomalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jomalithi|jomalithi]] || [[word:jomaliji|jomaliji]] || [[word:jomalishi|jomalishi]] || [[word:jomaliki|jomaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jomaluthuthu|jomaluthuthu]] || [[word:jomalujuju|jomalujuju]] || [[word:jomalushushu|jomalushushu]] || [[word:jomalukuku|jomalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jomaluthu|jomaluthu]] || [[word:jomaluju|jomaluju]] || [[word:jomalushu|jomalushu]] || [[word:jomaluku|jomaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jomalufthuf|jomalufthuf]] || [[word:jomalufjuf|jomalufjuf]] || [[word:jomalufshuf|jomalufshuf]] || [[word:jomalufkuf|jomalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jomalethe|jomalethe]] || [[word:jomaleje|jomaleje]] || [[word:jomaleshe|jomaleshe]] || [[word:jomaleke|jomaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jomalothotho|jomalothotho]] || [[word:jomalojojo|jomalojojo]] || [[word:jomaloshosho|jomaloshosho]] || [[word:jomalokoko|jomalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jomalotho|jomalotho]] || [[word:jomalojo|jomalojo]] || [[word:jomalosho|jomalosho]] || [[word:jomaloko|jomaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jomalofthof|jomalofthof]] || [[word:jomalofjof|jomalofjof]] || [[word:jomalofshof|jomalofshof]] || [[word:jomalofkof|jomalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jomalÃŸfthÃŸf|jomalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jomalÃŸfjÃŸf|jomalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jomalÃŸfshÃŸf|jomalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jomalÃŸfkÃŸf|jomalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jomalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|jomalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jomalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|jomalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jomalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|jomalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jomalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|jomalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jomalÃŸfthÃŸf|jomalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jomalÃŸfjÃŸf|jomalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jomalÃŸfshÃŸf|jomalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jomalÃŸfkÃŸf|jomalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jomalÃŸfthÃŸf|jomalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jomalÃŸfjÃŸf|jomalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jomalÃŸfshÃŸf|jomalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jomalÃŸfkÃŸf|jomalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jomalÃḊthÃḊ|jomalÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:jomalÃḊjÃḊ|jomalÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:jomalÃḊshÃḊ|jomalÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:jomalÃḊkÃḊ|jomalÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jomalathatha|jomalathatha]] || [[word:jomalajaja|jomalajaja]] || [[word:jomalashasha|jomalashasha]] || [[word:jomalakaka|jomalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jomalatha|jomalatha]] || [[word:jomalaja|jomalaja]] || [[word:jomalasha|jomalasha]] || [[word:jomalaka|jomalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jomalafthaf|jomalafthaf]] || [[word:jomalafjaf|jomalafjaf]] || [[word:jomalafshaf|jomalafshaf]] || [[word:jomalafkaf|jomalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jomalasha|jomalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jomalshÃḋsha|jomalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jomalrosha|jomalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jomalmusha|jomalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jomalyasha|jomalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojomalnkshÃḋsha|gojomalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojomalnkrosha|gojomalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojomalnkmusha|gojomalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojomalnkyasha|gojomalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jomamalasha|jomamalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jomamalshÃḋsha|jomamalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jomamalrosha|jomamalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jomamalmusha|jomamalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jomamalyasha|jomamalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojomamalnkshÃḋsha|gojomamalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojomamalnkrosha|gojomamalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojomamalnkmusha|gojomamalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojomamalnkyasha|gojomamalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jemÃḊlasha|jemÃḊlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jemÃḊlshÃḋsha|jemÃḊlshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jemÃḊlrosha|jemÃḊlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jemÃḊlmusha|jemÃḊlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jemÃḊlyasha|jemÃḊlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojemÃḊlnkshÃḋsha|gojemÃḊlnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojemÃḊlnkrosha|gojemÃḊlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojemÃḊlnkmusha|gojemÃḊlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojemÃḊlnkyasha|gojemÃḊlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:jomfalasha|jomfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jomfalshÃḋsha|jomfalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jomfalrosha|jomfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jomfalmusha|jomfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jomfalyasha|jomfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojomfalnkshÃḋsha|gojomfalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojomfalnkrosha|gojomfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojomfalnkmusha|gojomfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojomfalnkyasha|gojomfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
